title: Cuneiform Tablet #0061: Achaemenid Letter
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a letter document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a letter document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Letter document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records letter matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
